Baraza liliomba mpango wa utekelezaji uandaliwe kwa mashauriano na watu wa kiasili Kwamab WHO hutoa msaada kwa nchi wanachama, kwa ombi, kwa ajili ya kuboresha afya ya wenyeji; na Kwamba uboreshaji wa Afya ya watu wa kiasili ujumuishwe katika uundaji wa mpango wa kazi wa kumi na nne wa WHO. Katika Azimio hilohilo, Baraza la Afya lilizitaka nchi wanachama, miongoni mwa kazi nyingine, kuendeleza ujuzi kuhusu hali ya afya ya watu wa asili, kwa ridhaa yao ya bure, ya awali na ya taarifa; Kuendeleza, kufadhili na kutekeleza mipango ya kitaifa ya afya, mikakati au hatua nyingine kwa ajili ya watu wa asili;
translations.hypothesis: Kamati ya Sita ya Dunia kuhusu Afya – Taarifa ya kila siku: 29 Mei 2023, Azimio la muhimu kwa kuimarisha afya ya Watawala – Kamati ya Dunia kuhusu Afya leo imethibitisha azimio la kipekee kuhusu afya ya Watawala, ambalo linatoa ombi kwa Mkurugenzi Mkuu kuandaa mpango wa kimataifa wa afya ya Watawala na kutoa kwa Kamati ya Dunia kuhusu Afya ya sita na sita mwaka wa 2026. Watawala, licha ya kuwa wanawakati mbalimbali na jamii, kwa ujumla wana urefu wa maisha wa chini kuliko idadi za watu ambazo si Watawala. Pia, wana ugonjwa mwingi na hali mbaya za afya, pamoja na ugonjwa wa sukari, vifo vya wanemama na watoto, na utoaji. Kamati ilitaka kuwa mpango huo unaandawe kwa ushauri na Watawala; kwamba WHO kutoa msaada kwa Mataifa Wanachama, kwa ombi, ili kuboresha afya ya Watawala; na kwamba uboreshaji wa afya ya Watawala unaingizwa katika utayarishaji wa Mpango Mkuu wa Kwania wa WHO wa sita. Katika azimio hilo, Kamati ilitaka Mataifa Wanachama, miongoni mwa majukumu mengine, kuandaa maarifa kuhusu hali ya afya ya Watawala, kwa uhuru, ushauri na makubaliano; kuandaa, kutoa fedha na kutekeleza mipango, mikakati au hatua za kitaifa kwa Watawala;

translations.source: encourage the attraction, training, recruitment and retention of Indigenous Peoples as health workers taking into account the traditional knowledge and practices. Related document: A76/A/CONF./1 - Health of Indigenous Peoples First-ever resolution to accelerate action on drowning preventionThe delegates at the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly agreed a resolution to accelerate action on global drowning prevention. The resolution requests Member States to assess their national drowning situation and to develop and implement multisectoral drowning prevention programmes. Drowning causes 236 000 deaths every year. It is a leading global cause of injury-related child deaths. Over the past decade, 2.5 million people died from drowning, and over 90% of those occurred in low- and middle-income countries. At the invitation of the United Nations (UN) General Assembly, WHO will coordinate actions within the UN system on drowning prevention and facilitate the observance of World Drowning Prevention Day on 25 July each year. WHO will also set up a Global Alliance for Drowning Prevention with organizations of the UN system, international development partners and nongovernmental organizations. To better understand the true burden and impact of drowning, the resolution further requests WHO to prepare a global status report on drowning prevention.
translations.reference: Kuhimiza mvuto, mafunzo, kuajiri na kubaki kwa watu wa kiasili kama wahudumu wa afya kwa kuzingatia maarifa na desturi za jadi. Hati inayohusiana: A76/A/ CONF./ 1- Afya ya watu wa kiasili Azimio la kwanza kabisa la kuharakisha hatua za kuzuia kuzama kwa maji Wajumbe katika mkutano wa Sabini na sita wa Baraza la Afya Ulimwenguni walikubaliana Azimio la kuharakisha hatua za kuzuia kuzama kwa maji Duniani. Azimio hilo linaziomba nchi wanachama kutathmini hali yao ya kitaifa ya kuzama majini na kuendeleza kutekeleza mipango ya sekta mbalimbali ya kuzuia kuzama maji. Kuzama husababisha vifo 236,000 kila mwaka. Ni sababu kuu ya kimataifa ya vifo vya watoto vinavyohusiana na majeraha. Katika muongo mmoja uliopita, watu milioni 2.5 walikufa kutokana na kufa maji, na zaidi ya 90% ya hao walitokea katika nchi za kipato cha chini na cha kati. Kwa mualiko wa Baraza kuu la umoja wa mataifa (UN), WHO itaratibu hatua ndani ya mfumo wa umoja wa mataifa kuhusu kuzuia kuzama na kuwezesha maadhimisho ya siku kuzuia kuzama Duniani tarehe 25 Julai kila mwaka. Pia WHO itaanzisha ushirikiano wa kimataifa wa kuzuia kuzama na mashirika ya mfumo wa umoja wa mataifa, washirika wa maendeleo wa kimataifa na mashirika yasiyo ya kiserikali. Ili kuelewa vyema mzigo na kweli wa athari za kuzama, Azimio hilo linaiomba zaidi WHO kuandaa ripoti ya hali ya kimataifa kuhusu kuzuia kuzama.
translations.hypothesis: kuendeleza, mafunzo, ajira, na kudumisha watu wa asili kama wataalamu wa afya, na kuzingatia maarifa na utamaduni wa asili. Nyaraka iliyo kuhusika: A76/A/CONF./1 - Afya ya Watu wa Asili, Mpango wa kwanza wa kuharakisha hatua katika kuzuia ajali za kuogwa. Mwakilishi katika Mkutano wa Sita wa Dunia wa Afya, walitathmini mpango wa kuharakisha hatua katika kuzuia ajali za kuogwa kimataifa. Mpango huo unaomba mataifa kuwa tathmini hali yao ya ajali za kuogwa na kuandaa na kutekeleza programu za kuzuia ajali za kuogwa katika sekta mbalimbali. Ajali za kuogwa husababisha vifo 236,000 kila mwaka. Ni moja ya sababu kuu za vifo vya watoto kuhusiana na majeraha. Katika miaka ya mwisho, watu milioni 2.5 walifariki kutokana na ajali za kuogwa, na zaidi ya 90% kati ya vifo hivyo vilitokea katika mataifa yenye uchumi mdogo na wa katikati. Kwenye mwaliko wa Kamati Kuu ya Jumuiya ya Mataifa (UN), WHO itawashirikisha katika mfumo wa UN katika kuzuia ajali za kuogwa na kuwezesha maadhimisho ya Siku ya Dunia ya Kuzuia Ajali za Kuogwa, tarehe 25 Julai kila mwaka. WHO pia itatoa umoja wa kimataifa kwa ajili ya kuzuia ajali za kuogwa, kwa kushirikisha mashirika ya mfumo wa UN, washiriki wa maendeleo wa kimataifa, na mashirika asiyojulishwa. Ili kuelewa kikamilifu mzigo na athari za ajali za kuogwa, mpango huo pia unaomba WHO kutoa ripoti ya kimataifa kuhusu kuzuia ajali za kuogwa.

translations.source: Related document: EB152/CONF./2 - Accelerating action on global drowning prevention Read more about the resolution World Drowning Prevention Day 2023 Member States mobilize behind resolution to tackle chemicals, waste and pollution Member States welcomed the resolution addressing environmental determinants, including management of chemicals and waste. The efforts can help prevent up to one fifth of all suicide-related deaths from highly hazardous pesticides. Member States were urged to bolster the implementation of existing WHO strategies including implementation of the WHO Chemicals Roadmap which outlines key roles of the health sector in implementing the Strategic Approach to International Chemicals Management. The resolution also encourages the Ministries of Health to engage in efforts to prepare proposals for an intergovernmental science policy panel and negotiations for a treaty to end plastic pollution. The resolution called upon the Director-General to undertake several actions, including: publishing a report on the health implications of chemicals, waste and pollution from a "One Health" perspective; updating the 2012 document on the State of the Science of Endocrine Disrupting Chemicals jointly with the United Nations Environment Programme; and
translations.reference: Hati inayohusiana: EB 152/CONF./2- Kuharakisha hatua ya kuzuia kuzama Duniani Soma zaidi kuhusu Azimio hilo Siku ya kuzuia kuzama Duniani 2023 Nchi wanachama zinahamasishana nyuma ya Azimio la kukabilina na kemikali, taka na uchafuzi wa mazingira Nchi wanachama zilikaribisha Azimio linaloshughulikia viashiria vya mzingira, ikiwa ni pamoja na usimamizi wa kemkali na taka. Jitihada hizo zinaweza kusaidia kuzuia hadi moja ya tano ya vifo vyote vinavyohusiana na kujiua kutokana na viuatilifu hatari. Nchi wanachama zilihimizwa kuimarisha utendaji wa mikakati iliyopo ya WHO ikijumuisha utekelezaji wa muongozo wa kemikali wa WHO unaoainisha majukumu muhimu ya sekta ya afya katika kutekeleza mkakati wa kudhibiti kemikali za kimataifa. Pia Azimio linahimiza wizara za afya kushiriki katika juhudi za kuandaa mapendekezo ya jopo la sera za sayansi kati ya serikali na mazungumzo ya makataba wa kukomesha uchafuzi wa plastiki. Azimio hilo lilimtaka mkurugenzi mkuu kuchukua hatua kadhaa, zikiwemo: Kuchapisha ripoti juu ya athari za kiafya za kemikali, takataka na uchafuzi wa mazingira kutoka kwa mtazamo wa "Afya Moja"; Kusasisha waraka wa 2012 kuhusu hali ya sayansi ya Endocrine kuharibu kemikali kwa pamoja na mpango wa mazingira wa umoja wa mataifa; na
translations.hypothesis: Nyarudhia: EB152/CONF./2 - Kushurutisha hatua katika kuzuia maji ya bahari Member States wamepokea azimio ambalo linaangazia mambo ya mazingira, pamoja na usimamizi wa kemikali na taka. Majaribio yanaweza kusaidia kuzuia hadi kwania ya vifo vyote vinavyohusiana na upande, kutokana na dawa za kemikali hatari. Majaribio yanaendelea kuhimiza nchi za wanachama kuimarisha utekelezaji wa sera za soko, pamoja na utekelezaji wa "Roadmap" ya Soko, ambayo inaangazia majukumu muhimu ya sekta ya afya katika utekelezaji wa Mbinu za Kimataifa za Usimamizi wa Kemikali. Azimio pia hutoa rai kwa Wizara za Afya kushiriki katika juhudi za kupanga mbinu kwa jopo la kisayansi la serikali na mazungumzo kwa mkataba wa kuondosha mchaka. Azimio linaomba Mkurugenzi Mkuu kuchukua hatua kadhaa, pamoja na: kuchapisha ripoti kuhusu athari za kemikali, taka na mchaka kutoka kwa mtazamo wa "Afya Yote"; kusasisha hati ya 2012 kuhusu "Hali ya Sayansi ya Kemikali za Kutengua Homoni" pamoja na Programu ya Kimataifa ya Mazingira;

translations.source: supporting countries in developing national or regional human biomonitoring programmes for chemicals of concern. Related document: A76/A/CONF./2 - The impact of chemicals, waste and pollution on human health WHO’s work on chemical safety and health Achieving well-being: a global frameworkMember States agreed to adopt the "Global framework for integrating well-being into public health utilizing a health promotion approach", which strives to enable all people to flourish and achieve their full physical and mental health potential throughout their lives and across generations. The Global framework recommends six key strategic directions that focus on: universal health coverage, equitable economies, protecting the planet, social protection systems, digital systems to enable health, and measuring and monitoring well-being. The framework proposes close collaboration with sectors outside the health sector to promote and protect health. It serves as a guide for all stakeholders to engage in a coherent and coordinated manner around a common purpose: promoting the health of people and planet in a sustainable and equitable manner. promoting the health of people and planet in a sustainable and equitable manner. The Assembly requests the Director-General to report on implementation of the global framework in 2024, 2026 and 2031. Related document: A76/7 Add.2 - Well-being and health promotion
translations.reference: Kusaidia nchi katika kuendeleza programu za kitaifa au kikanda za uchunguzi wa binadamu kwa kemikali zinazohusika. Hati inayohusiana: A76/A/ CONF./ 2 - Athari za kemikali, takataka na uchafuziwa mazingira kwa Afya ya Binadamu WHO inafanya kazi juu ya usalama wa kemikali na afya kufikia ustawi: Nchi wanachama za mfumo wa kimataifa zilikubali kupitisha "mfumo wa kitaifa wa kuunganisha ustawi katika afya ya umma kwa kutumia mbinu ya kukuza afya", ambayo inajitahidi kuwawezesha watu wote kustawi na kufikia uwezo wao kamili wa afya ya kimwili na kiakili katika maisha yao yote na katika vizazi vyote. Mfumo wa kimataifa unapendekeza maelekezo sita muhimu ya kimkakati ambayo yanazingatia: Huduma ya afya kwa wote, Uchumi sawa, mifumo ya kidijitali kuwezesha afya, na kupima na kufuatilia ustawi. Mfumo unapendekeza ushirikiano wa karibu na sekta zilizo nje ya afya ili kukuza na kulind afya. Inatumika kama muongozo kwa washikadau wote kushiriki kwa njia iliyounganishwa na ilivyoratibiwa kwa madhumuni ya pamoja: kukuza afya ya watu na sayari kwa njia endelevu na ya usawa. Kukuza afya ya watu na sayari kwa njia endelevu na yenye usawa. Baraza linamtaka mkurugenzi mkuu kuripoti kkuhusu utekelezaji wa mfumo wa kimataifa wa mwaka 2024, 2026 na 2031. Hati inayohusiana: A76/ 7 Add.2 - Ustawi na kukuza Afya
translations.hypothesis: kuunga mkono nchi katika kuendeleza programu za kimbinadamu zawachungaji katika nchi au eneo, kwa ajili ya kemikali za muhimu. Nyaraka iliyo kuhusika: A76/A/CONF./2 - Athari za kemikali, taka na mazingira kwenye afya ya binadamu. Kazi ya WHO kuhusu usalama na afya ya kemikali. Kufanya maisha bora: mfumo wa kimataifa Mwanachama walitathmini kuchukua "mfumo wa kimataifa wa kuunganisha maisha bora katika afya ya umma, kwa kutumia mbinu ya kukuza afya", ambapo lengo ni kuwezesha watu wote kufanya vizuri na kufikia uwezo wao kamili wa kiafya, katika maisha yao na katika vizazi. Mfumo wa kimataifa una mapendekezo ya mweka, ambayo yanazingatia: huduma za kiafya za kiujumla, uchumi sawa, kulinda dunia, mifumo ya usalama, mifumo ya dijitali ili kuwezesha afya, na kupima na kufuatilia maisha bora. Mfumo una pendekeza ushirikiano wa karibu na sekta nje ya sekta ya afya, ili kukuza na kulinda afya. Hii ni mwongozo kwa wote wanaohusika, ili kushiriki kwa njia inayofanana na imara, kwa lengo moja: kukuza afya ya watu na dunia kwa njia endelevu na sawa.

translations.source: New resolution to accelerate efforts on food micronutrient fortification The delegates approved a resolution on accelerating efforts to prevent micronutrient deficiencies through safe and effective food fortification. Deficiencies in vitamin and mineral status, particularly of folate, iron, vitamin A, and zinc, affect 50% of all preschool aged children and 67% of all women of reproductive age worldwide. Micronutrient deficiencies can have serious consequences, including spina bifida and other neural tube defects.Large scale food fortification is part of the solution. By adding essential vitamins and minerals to staple foods and condiments, such as wheat and maize flours, rice, cooking oil and salt in accordance with national consumption patterns and deficiencies, countries can correct and further prevent a demonstrated micronutrient deficiency. The resolution urges Member States to develop policies on food fortification with micronutrients and/or supplementation, and to consider ways of strengthening financing and monitoring mechanisms. The resolution was agreed under the umbrella of the United Nations Decade of Action on Nutrition (2016-2025) report. Related document: EB152/CONF./5 Accelerating efforts for preventing micronutrient deficiencies and their consequences, including spina bifida and other neural tube defects, through safe and effective food fortification Related links
translations.reference: Azimio jipya la kuharakisha juhudi za urutubishaji wa virutubisho vya chakula Wajumbe waliidhinisha Azimio la kuongeza kasi ya juhudi za kuzuia upungufu wa virutubisho kupitia urutubishaji wa chakula. Upungufu katika hali ya vitamini na madini,, hasa ya folate, chuma, vitamini A, na Zinki huathiri 50% ya watoto wote wenye umri wa shule ya awali na 67% ya wanawake wote wa umri wa uzazi Duniani kote. Upungufu wa virutubisho unaweza kuwa na madhara makubwa, ikiwemo uti wa mgongo na Kasoro nyingine za mirija ya Neva. Urutubishaji wa chakula kwa kiwango kikubwa ni sehemu ya suluhisho. Kwa kuongezea vitamini na madini muhimu katika vyakula na vitoweo, kama vile unga wa ngano na mahindi, mchele, mafuta ya kupikia na chumvi kwa mujibu wa mifumo ya matumizi ya kitaifa na upungufu, nchi zinaweza kurekebisha na kuzuia zaidi upungufu wa virutubisho unaonekana. Azimio hilo linahimiza nchi wanachma kubuni sera kuhusu urutubishaji wa chakula kwa virutubishi vidogo na/ au kuongeza, na kuzingatia njia za kuimarisha mifumo ya ufadhili na ufuatiliaji. Azimio hilo lilikubaliwa chini ya mwamvuli wa ripoti ya muongo wa utekelezaji wa umoja wa mataifa kuhusu Lishe (2016-2025). Hati inayohusiana: EB 152/CONF./5 Kuongeza kasi ya juhudi za kuzuia upungufu wa virutubisho na madhara yake, ikiwemo uti wa mgongo na kasoro nyingine za mirija ya Neva kupitia urutubishaji wa chakula salama na bora Viunganishi vinavyohusiana
translations.hypothesis: Mpango mpya wa kuharakisha juhudi za kuimarisha vyutomo katika chakula Mwakilishi wakatumia mpango kuhusu kuharakisha juhudi za kuzuia upungufu wa vyutomo kupitia uimarishaji salama na wa ufanisi wa chakula. Upungufu katika vitamini na madini, haswa folate, chuma, vitamini A, na zinki, unaathiri 50% ya watoto wote wa umri wa shule na 67% ya wanawake wote wa umri wa uzazi duniani. Upungufu wa vyutomo unaweza kuwa na matokeo hatari, pamoja na spina bifida na ukiolojia mengine. Uimarishaji wa chakula kwa wingi ni mojawapo ya suluhisho. Kwa kuongeza vitamini na madini muhimu katika vyakula vya msingi na viunga, kama vile unga wa shayiri na mahindi, ngano, mafuta ya kupikia na chumvi, kulingana na miundo ya matumizi na upungufu za kitaifa, nchi zinaweza kurekebisha na kuzuia zaidi upungufu wa vyutomo uliothibitishwa. Mpango huu unawaelekeza Majimbo kuhusisha sera za uimarishaji wa chakula na vyutomo, na/au dawa, na kuzingatia njia za kuimarisha mifumo ya fedha nawachungisho. Mpango huu ulitoka chini ya mada ya "Decade of Action on Nutrition" ya Umoja wa Mataifa (2016-2025). Nyaraka iliyo kuhusika: EB152/CONF./5 Kuharakisha juhudi za kuzuia upungufu wa vyutomo na matokeo yao, pamoja na spina bifida na ukiolojia mengine, kupitia uimarishaji salama na wa ufanisi wa chakula.

translations.source: Read more about the resolution WHO's work on food fortification Member States approve actions to counter substandard and falsified medicines On 27 May, the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly approved a resolution to conduct an independent review of the Member State Mechanism (MSM) for incidents, substandard and falsified medicines, reinforcing the Director-General’s January 2023 call for increased vigilance and action in this important area. The review will be initiated at the next MSM steering committee meeting later in 2023. The Assembly established the MSM in 2012 to tackle substandard and falsified medical products from a public health perspective and in a transparent and inclusive way. The goal of the MSM is to protect public health and promote access to affordable, safe, efficacious and quality medical products. Noting recent events of contaminated medicines found on various markets and related preventable deaths, Member States emphasized the support needed to improve their capacity to prevent, detect and respond to substandard and falsified medical products through access to appropriate technologies, including laboratory testing facilities, along with improved oversight on informal markets and advertising, and the online sale of medical products. Member States called for embracing and implementing track and trace technologies for market control and surveillance, as well as the need for formal collaboration by relevant local and global partners such as law enforcement and customs administrations. Member States were encouraged to align with conventions aimed at improvement of legislation and imposition of prohibitive sanctions for wrongful dealing in substandard and falsified medical products.
translations.reference: Soma zaidi kuhusu Azimio hilo WHO inafaya kazi ya kuimarisha chakula Nchi wanachama zimeidhinisha hatua za kukabiliana na dawa zisizo na viwango na zilizounganishwa Tarehe 27, Mei, Bunge la Sabini na sita la Afya Duniani liliidhinisha Azimio la kufanya mapitio huru ya mfumo wa nchi wanachama (MSM) kwa matukio, Dawa Duni, na zilizoghushiwa, na kutilia mkazo wito wa mkurugenzi mkuu wa Januari 2023 wa kuongeza umakini na hatua katika eneo hili muhimu. Uhakiki utaanzishwa katika kikao kijacho cha kamati ya uongozi ya MSM baadae mwaka 2023. Baraza lilianzisha MSM mwaka 2012 ili kukabiliana na bidhaa za matibabu duni na potofu kutoka kwa mtazamo wa afya ya umma na kwa njia ya uwazi na inayojumuisha wote. Lengo la MSM ni kulinda afya ya umma na kukuza upatikanaji wa bidhaa za matibabu za bei nafuu, salama, zinazofaa na bora. Zikibainisha matukio ya hivi karibuni ya dawa zilizochafuliwa zilizopatikana na hiyo zilisisitiza usaidizi unaohitajika ili kuboresha uwezo wao wa kuzuia, kugundua na kukubaliana na bidhaa duni na potofu kupitia upatikanaji wa teknolojia zinazofaa, ikiwemo vifaa vya kupimia maabara, pamoja na uangalizi ulioboresha kwenye masoko na utangazaji usio rasmi, na uuzaji wa mtandaoni wa bidhaa za matibabu. Nchi wanachama zilitoa wito wa kukumbatia na kutekeleza teknolojia ya kufuatilia na kugundua kwa ajili ya kudhibiti na ufuatiliaji wa soko, vilevile hitaji la ushirikiano rasmi na washirika husika wa ndani na kimataifa kama vile utekelezaji wa sheria na tawala za forodha. Nchi wanachama zilihimizwa kupatana na mikataba inayolenga uboreshaji wa sheria na uwekaji vikwazo vizuizi kwa kushughulika kimakosa katika bidhaa za kimatibabu zilizo duni na zilizoghushiwa.
translations.hypothesis: Pata maelezo zaidi kuhusu azimio la Kazi ya WHO katika ufuaji wa chakula, Mataifa yanathibitisha hatua za kupinga dawa za ubora na za bandia. Mnamo 27 Mei, Kamati ya Sita ya Dunia ya Afya ilithibitisha azimio la kufanya tathmini ya moja kwa moja ya Mfumo wa Mataifa (MSM) kuhusu tukio, dawa za ubora na za bandia, ikiunga mkono wito wa Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa Januari 2023 wa tahadhari na hatua zaidi katika eneo hili muhimu. Tathmini hiyo itaanza katika mkutano ujao wa kamati ya uongozi ya MSM mwishoni mwa 2023. Kamati ilianzisha MSM mwaka 2012 ili kushughulikia bidhaa za matibabu za ubora na za bandia kutoka kwa mtazamo wa afya ya umma, na kwa njia inayoelewa na ya pamoja. Lengo la MSM ni kulinda afya ya umma na kuendeleza ufikiaji wa bidhaa za matibabu za bei nafuu, salama, na za ubora. Akizingatia matukio ya hivi karibuni ya dawa zilizotuzwa kwenye masoko mbalimbali na vifo vinavyoweza kuepukwa, mataifa yalitetea msaada unaohitajika ili kuboresha uwezo wao wa kuzuia, kugundua, na kujibu bidhaa za matibabu za ubora na za bandia kupitia ufikiaji wa teknolojia inayofaa, pamoja na usimamizi bora wa masoko rasmi na matangazo, na mauzo ya mtandaoni ya bidhaa za matibabu. Mataifa walitaka kuamini na kutumia teknolojia za kufuatilia na kutambua kwa udhibiti wa soko na usalama, pamoja na uhitaji wa ushirikiano rasmi na washiriki wa ndani na kimataifa kama vile vyombo vya sheria na zima. Mataifa walitakiwa kuunga mkono mkataba unaolenga kuboresha sheria na kuteketeza vikwazo kwa usambazaji wa bidhaa za matibabu za ubora na za bandia.

translations.source: The Secretariat is requested to report on progress in this area to the Executive Board in 2025. Related document: EB152/9 - Substandard and falsified medical products Related links WHO Member State Mechanism on incidents, substandard and falsified medical products WHO's work on substandard and falsified medical products First ever resolution on behavioural sciences for better health is adopted Today Member States adopted the behavioural sciences for better health resolution with Member States showing broad consensus towards the need for integrating systematically behavioural science theory, methods and approaches across health topics and public health functions. The resolution urges Member States to acknowledge the role of behavioural science in achieving better health outcomes, to identify opportunities for increased use and, to establish functions and units for generating and translating evidence to inform policies and programmes. It also requests the Director-General to mainstream the use of behavioural science within the organization and to provide support to Member States through the development of guidance and the provision of technical assistance. Member States recognized the achievement of the Behavioural Sciences for Better Health Initiative led by the secretariat, congratulated Malaysia, sponsor of the resolution, as well as the other 19 countries that joined as co-sponsors, and thanked the Director-General for the report.
translations.reference: Sekretarieti inaombwa kutoa taarifa ya maendeleo katika eneo hili kwa halmashauri kuu mwaka 2025. Hati inayohusiana: EB 152/ 9 - Bidhaa za matibabu zisizo na viwango na za kughushi Viunganishi vinavyohusiana Uratibu wa nchi mwanachama wa WHO kuhusu matukio, bidhaa za matibabu zisizo na viwango na za kughushi Kazi ya WHO juu ya bidhaa za matibabu duni na za kughushi Azimio la kwanza kabisa juu ya sayansi ya tabia kwa afya bora limepitishwa Leo nchi wanachama zimepitisha sayansi ya tabia kwa ajili ya utatuzi bora wa afya huku nchi wanachama zikionyesha maafikiano mapana kuhusu hitaji la kuunganisha kwa utaratibu nadharia ya asayansi ya tabia, njia na mbinu katika mada zote za afya na kazi za afya ya umma. Azimio hilo linahimiza nchi wanachama kutambua jukumu la sayansi ya tabia katika kufikia matokeo bora ya afya, kutambua fursa za kuongezeka kwa matumizi na, kuanzisha kazi na vitengo vya kuzalisha na kitafsiri ushahidi ili kufahamisha sera na programu. Pia linamuomba mkurugenzi mkuu kujumuisha matumizi ya sayansi ya tabia ndani ya shirika na kutoa usaidizi kwa nchi wanachama kupitia uundaji wa muongozo na utoaji wa usaidizi wa kiufundi. Nchi wanachama zilitambua mafanikio ya mpango wa sayansi ya tabia kwa afya bora unaoongozwa na sekretarieti, ziliipongeza Malaysia, mdhamini wa Azimio hilo, vilevile nchi nyingine 19 zilizojiunga kama ufadhili wenza, na kumshukuru mkurugenzi mkuu kwa ripoti hiyo.
translations.hypothesis: Sekretariat linatozwa kutoa taarifa kuhusu maendeleo katika eneo hili kwa Bodi ya Uongozi mwaka wa 2025. Nyaraka iliyo kuhusiana: EB152/9 - Bidhaa za matibabu zenye ubora duni na bandika. Rasilimali za mtandaoni: Mfumo wa Jumuiya ya WHO kuhusu tukio, bidhaa za matibabu zenye ubora duni na bandika. Kazi ya WHO kuhusu bidhaa za matibabu zenye ubora duni na bandika. Mpango wa kwanza kuhusu sayansi ya tabia kwa afya bora umepewa. Leo, Jumuiya za kiafya zimepewa mpango kuhusu sayansi ya tabia kwa afya bora, na Jumuiya zina maazimio makubwa kuhusu uhitaji wa kuunganisha sayansi ya tabia, mbinu na njia katika mada za afya na kazi za afya ya umma. Mpango huo unaomba Jumuiya za kiafya kutambua jukumu la sayansi ya tabia katika kufikia matokeo bora ya afya, kutambua fursa za matumizi zaidi, na kuanzisha kazi na vitengo kwa kuzalisha na kutafsiri ushahidi ili kuleta taarifa kwa sera na programu. Pia, inatoa ombi kwa Mkurugenzi Mkuu kutumia sayansi ya tabia ndani ya shirika na kutoa msaada kwa Jumuiya za kiafya kupitia maendeleo na kutoa ushauri wa kiufundi. Jumuiya za kiafya zimezingatia mafanikio ya Mpango wa Sayansi ya Tabia kwa Afya Bora, ambalo linaongozwa na sekretariat, na zimefurahishwa Malaysia, ambayo ni mshiriki wa mpango, pamoja na nchi zingine 19 ambazo zimejiunga kama washiriki, na zimeashiria Mkurugenzi Mkuu kwa taarifa.

translations.source: They stressed the importance of building capacity in this area, particularly in regional offices, and of creating a repository of evidence and synergies between sectors, including with academia and the private sector. Related documents: EB152(23) - Behavioural sciences for better health EB152/25 - Behavioural sciences for better health, Report by the Director-General Behavioural Sciences for Better Health Initiative The above items were discussed as part of the document A76/7 Rev.1 - Consolidated report by the Director-General.
translations.reference: Walisisitiza umuhimu wa kujenga uwezo katika eneo hili, hususani katika ofisi za kikanda, na kuunda hifadhi ya ushahidi na ushirikiano kati ya sekta, zikiwemo vyuo na sekta binafsi. Hati zinazohusiana: EB 152 (23) - sayansi ya tabia kwa afya bora. EB 152/ 25 - Sayansi ya tabia kwa afya bora, ripoti ya mkurugenzi mkuu. Sayansi ya tabia kwa mpango wa afya bora vipengee vilivyotajwa hapo juu vilijadiliwa kama sehemu ya waraka A76/7 Rev.1 - Ripoti iliyounganishwa na Mkurugenzi Mkuu.

Nyaraka za kuhusiana: EB152(23) - Sayansi ya tabia kwa afya bora EB152/25 - Sayansi ya tabia kwa afya bora, Ripoti ya Mkurugenzi wa Sayansi ya Tabia kwa Afya Bora.  Nyaraka hizi zilisomwa kama sehemu ya nyaraka A76/7 Rev.1 - Ripoti iliyounganishwa na Mkurugenzi.

translations.source: Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly – Daily update: 27 May 2023 First global strategy on infection prevention and controlThe World Health Assembly agreed today on the first-ever global strategy on infection prevention and control (IPC), which builds on almost two decades of efforts led by WHO and partners. The strategy provides Member States with strategic directions to substantially reduce the ongoing risk of health care-associated infections (HAIs), including those that exhibit antimicrobial resistance. HAIs are among the most frequent adverse events occurring in the context of health service delivery. The COVID-19 pandemic and recent major disease outbreaks such as Ebola virus disease, the Middle East respiratory syndrome and the Sudan virus disease have clearly exposed the existing gaps in IPC programmes in all countries. The strategy sets a clear vision: by 2030, everyone accessing or providing health care is safe from associated infections. Its three key objectives are: to prevent infection in health care; act to ensure IPC programmes are in place and implemented; and coordinate IPC activities with other areas and sectors. The strategy is focused on any setting where health care is delivered, across the health system; it is based on the principle of clean and safe care as a fundamental component of the right to health, which is equity driven, and which should ensure accountability and sustainability. The global IPC strategy will be complemented by, and used in conjunction with, an associated global action plan and monitoring framework, that will be developed in 2023–2024. Related document EB152/9 - Draft global strategy on infection prevention and control, Executive summary Report by the Director-General
translations.reference: Mkutano wa Sabini na sita wa afya Duniani - Taarifa ya kila siku: 27 Mei 2023. Mkakati wa kwanza wa kimataifa kuhusu kuzuia na kudhibiti maambukizi, mkutano wa afya Ulimwenguni umekubaliana leo kuhusu mkakati wa kwanza kabisa wa kimataifa wa kuzuia na kudhibiti maambukizi (IPC), ambao unatokana karibu miongo miwili ya juhudi zinazoongozwa na WHO na washirika. Mkakati huo unazipa nchi wanachama maelekezo ya kimkakati ya kupunguza kwa kiasi kikubwa hatari inayoendelea ya magonjwa yanayohusiana na huduma ya afya (HAIs), ikiwemo yale ambayo yanaonyesha ukinzani wa viua vijasumu. HAIs ni miongoni mwa matukio mabaya ya mara kwa mara yanatokea katika muktadha wa utoaji wa huduma za afya. Janga la UVIKO-19 na milipuko ya hivi karibuni ya magonjwa kama vile virusi vya Ebola, ugonjwa wa kupumua huko mashariki ya kati na virusi vya sudani vimefichua dhahiri mapungufu yaliyopo katika programu za IPC katika nchi zote. Mkakati unaweka dira wazi: Ifikapo 2030, kila mtu anaepata au kutoa huduma ya afya yupo salama kutokana na maambukizi yanayohusiana. Malengo yake makuu matatu ni: Kuzuia maambukizi katika huduma ya afya; kuchukua hatua ili kuhakikisha mipango ya IPC ipo na inatekelezwa; na kuratibu shughuli za IPC na maeneo na sekta nyinginezo. Mkakati unalenga katika mazingira yoyote ambapo huduma ya afya inatolewa, katika mfumo wa afya; inatokana na kanuni ya utunzaji safi na salama kama sehemu ya msingi ya haki ya afya, ambayo inaendeshwa na usawa, na ambayo inapaswa kuhakikisha uwajibikaji na uendelevu. Mkakati wa kimataifa wa IPC utakamilishwa na, na kutumiwa pamoja na, mpango wa utekelezaji wa kimataifa unaohusishwa na mfumo wa ufuatiliaji, ambao utatengenezwa mwaka 2023- 2024. Hati inayohusiana EB 152/9- Rasimu ya mkakati wa kimataifa juu ya kuzuia na kudhibiti maambukizi, muhtasari wa mtendaji ripoti ya mkurugenzi mkuu
translations.hypothesis: Kamati ya Sita ya Dunia kuhusu Afya – Taarifa ya kila siku: 27 Mei 2023 – Mkakati wa kwanza wa kimataifa kuhusu kuzuia na kudhibiti magonjwa. Kamati ya Dunia kuhusu Afya imepata maazimio kuhusu mkakati wa kwanza wa kimataifa kuhusu kuzuia na kudhibiti magonjwa (KUZU), ambao unaendelea juhudi za zaidi ya miaka mitano, ambazo zinaongoza WHO na washirika. Mkakati huu unaotoa matawi muhimu kwa mataifa, ili kupunguza hatari ya magonjwa yanayotokana na huduma za afya, pamoja na wale wanaozingatia uresistsansi ya dawa za mipakani. Magonjwa yanayotokana na huduma za afya ni miongoni mwa matukio hasi yanayotokea katika utoaji wa huduma za afya. Janga la COVID-19 na mlipuko wa magonjwa kubwa hivi majuzi, kama vile ugonjwa wa virusi vya Ebola, sindromi ya shughuli za Mashariki ya kati na ugonjwa wa virusi vya Sudan, wameonyesha wazi pengine katika programu za KUZU katika nchi zote. Mkakati huu una wazo wazi: hadi mwaka wa 2030, kila mtu anayepata au kutoa huduma za afya, anaaminika kutoka magonjwa yanayohusiana. Lengo lake kuu ni: kuzuia magonjwa katika huduma za afya; kuchukua hatua za kuhakikisha programu za KUZU zinawekwa na kutekelezwa; na kusawazisha shughuli za KUZU na maeneo na sekta zingine. Mkakati huu unaangazia mahali popo ambapo huduma za afya zinatozwa, katika mfumo wa afya; una msingi katika kanuni ya huduma salama na salama kama sehemu muhimu ya haki ya afya, ambayo ni ya usawa, na inapaswa kuhakikisha uwajibikaji na uendelevu. Mkakati wa kimataifa wa KUZU utaambatana na, na kutumika pamoja na, mpango wa kimataifa wa hatua na mfumo wawachungaji, ambao utaundwa katika mwaka wa 2023–2024. Nyaraka iliyo kuhusika: EB152/9 – Mkakati wa kwanza wa kimataifa kuhusu kuzuia na kudhibiti magonjwa, Muhtasari wa ripoti kutoka Mkurugenzi Mkuu

translations.source: WHO's work on infection prevention and control Historic resolution paves the way for strengthening rehabilitation in health systemsToday the World Health Assembly agreed a landmark resolution on strengthening rehabilitation in health systems. Rehabilitation services play a key role in ensuring the enjoyment of human rights including the highest attainable standard of physical and mental health. It also promotes sexual and reproductive health, and recognizes the right to work and the right to education. This landmark resolution aims to address the challenges in rehabilitation such as the need to: increase awareness of rehabilitation when setting health priorities and research agendas, allocating resources, promoting cooperation and enabling technology transfer; ensure countries are better equipped to respond to the sudden increase in rehabilitation needs including assistive technology due to health emergencies; ensure persons in marginalized and vulnerable situations have access to affordable, quality and appropriate rehabilitation services including assistive technology; avoid high out-of-pocket costs for people to access rehabilitation services and assistive technology that can cause financial hardships; and address the current insufficient level of rehabilitation workforce to serve the needs of the population. The resolution lists a range of actions to be taken by the WHO Secretariat such as:
translations.reference: Kazi ya WHO kuhusu kuzuia na kudhibiti maambukizi Azimio la kihistoria linatayarisha njia ya kuimarisha urekebishaji katika mifumo ya afya leo. Baraza la afya la ulimwenguni limekubali Azimio muhimu kuhusu kuimarisha urekebishaji katika mifumo ya afya. Huduma za urekebishaji zina jukumu muhimu katika kuhakikisha kufurahia haki za binadamu ikiwa ni pamoja na kiwango cha juu kinachoweza kufikiwa cha afya ya kimwili na kiakili. Pia inakuza afya ya uzazi na jinsia, na inatambua haki ya kufanya kazi na haki ya kupata elimu. Azimio hili muhimu linalenga kutatua changamoto katika ukarabati kama vile haja ya: Kuongeza ufahamu wa ukarabati wakati wa kuweka vipaumbele vya afya na ajenda za utafiti, ugawaji wa rasilimali, kukuza ushirikiano na kuwezesha uhamisho wa teknolojia.; Kuhakikisha nchi zina vifaa vya kutosha kukabiliana na ongezeko la ghafla la mahitaji ya ukarabati ikijumuisha teknolojia ya usaidizi kutokana na dharura za kiafya.; Kuhakikisha watu walio katika mazingira magumu na walio katika mazingira hatarishi wanapata huduma nafuu, bora na zinazofaa na ukarabati ikiwa ni pamoja na teknolojia saidizi; Kuepuka gharama kubwa za nje kwa watu kupata huduma za ukarabati na teknolojia saidizi ambayo inaweza kusababisha ugumu wa kifedha; na Kushughulikia kiwango cha sasa kisichotosha cha wafanyakazi wa ukarabati kuhudumia mahitaji ya watu. Azimio hilo linaorodhesha anuwai ya hatua zinazopaswa kuchukuliwa na sekretarieti ya WHO kama vile:
translations.hypothesis: Kazi ya WHO kuhusu kuzuia na kudhibiti magonjwa, azimio la kihistoria linaweka mwelekeo wa kuimarisha huduma za upulizaji katika mifumo ya afya. Huduma za upulizaji zina jukumu muhimu katika kuhakikisha matumizi endelevu ya haki za binadamu, pamoja na kiwango cha juu zaidi la afya ya kimwili na akili. Pia, inaendeleza afya ya kiafya na uzazi, na kutambua haki ya kazi na haki ya elimu. Azimio hili la kihistoria lina lengo la kushughulikia changamoto katika upulizaji, kama vile: kuongeza ufahamu kuhusu upulizaji wakati wa kuweka kipaumbele na mipango ya utafiti, kuwezesha rasilimali, kuendeleza ushirikiano na ubadilishi wa teknolojia; kuhakikisha kuwa nchi zina vifaa bora ili kujibu ongezeko la haraka la mahitaji ya upulizaji, pamoja na teknolojia ya msaada, kutokana na dharura za afya; kuhakikisha kwamba watu katika hali za hatari na dhaifu wana ufikiaji wa huduma bora na za upulizaji, pamoja na teknolojia ya msaada, kwa bei nafuu; kuepuka gharama kubwa kwa watu kupata huduma za upulizaji na teknolojia ya msaada ambazo zinaweza kusababisha matatizo ya kifedha; na kushughulikia kiwango cha sasa cha wafanyakazi wa upulizaji ambacho kinafanya kazi, ili kuhudumia mahitaji ya jamii. Azimio hili linaorodhesha hatua mbalimbali ambazo itachukuliwa na ofisi ya WHO, kama vile:

translations.source: publishing a baseline report by the end of 2026 with information on the capacity of Member States to respond to rehabilitation needs; developing targets and indicators for effective coverage of rehabilitation services by 2030; ensuring appropriate resources are allocated at WHO to support Member States in implementing technical guidance and resources; and supporting Member States to integrate rehabilitation and assistive technology in their emergency preparedness and response plan. The WHO Secretariat will report on progress in the implementation of this resolution to the Health Assembly in 2026, 2028 and 2030. Related document: EB152/8 - Strengthening rehabilitation in health systems, Report by the Director-General Related link WHO's work on rehabilitation The items above were discussed as part of the document A76/7 Rev.1 - Consolidated report by the Director-General. Resolution on strengthening diagnostics capacity
translations.reference: Kuchapisha ripoti ya msingi kufikia mwishoni mwa 2026 yenye taarifa juu ya uwezo wa nchi wanachama kujibu mahitaji ya urekebishaji; Kuendeleza shabaha na viashirio kwa ajili ya utoaji wa huduma bora za ukarabati ifikapo 2030; Kuhakikisha rasilimali zinazofaa zimelengwa katika WHO kusaidia nchi wanachama katika kutekeleza muongozo wa kiufundi na rasilimali; na kusaidia nchi wanachama kujumuisha urekebishaji na teknolojia ya usaidizi katika maandalizi yao ya dharura na mpango wa kukabiliana. Sekretarieti ya WHO itatoa taarifa kuhusu maendeleo katika utekelezaji wa Azimio hili kwa Baraza la Afya mwaka 2026, 2028 na 2030. Hati inayohusiana: EB 152/ 8 - Kuimarisha ukarabati katika mfumo ya afya, ripoti ya mkurugenzi mkuu. Kiunganishi kinachohusiana Kazi ya WHO kuhusu ukarabati Mambo yaliyopo hapo juu yalijadiliwa kama sehemu ya waraka A76/7 Rev.1 - Ripoti jumuishi ya mkurugenzi mkuu. Azimio la kuimarisha uwezo wa uchunguzi
translations.hypothesis: kuandika ripoti ya msingi mwishoni mwa 2026, ikiwa na taarifa kuhusu uwezo wa mataifa ya wanachama kujibu mahitaji ya uokoaji; kuendeleza malengo na vigezo kwa utoaji wa huduma bora za uokoaji mwishoni mwa 2030; kuhakikisha kuwa rasilimali zinazofaa zinapewa katika WHO ili kuunga mkono mataifa ya wanachama katika kutumia mwongozo na rasilimali za kiufundi; na kusaidia mataifa ya wanachama kuunganisha uokoaji na teknolojia ya msaada katika mipango yao ya maandalizi na majibu ya dharura. Sekreteriat ya WHO kitatoa ripoti kuhusu maendeleo katika utekelezaji wa azimio hili kwa Kamati ya Afya mwaka wa 2026, 2028 na 2030. Nyaraka iliyo kuhusika: EB152/8 - Kuimarisha uokoaji katika mifumo ya afya, Ripoti kutoka kwa Mkurugenzi Mkuu. Kiungo cha uhusiano: Kazi ya WHO kuhusu uokoaji. Vitu vilivyo hapo juu vilizungumzwa kama sehemu ya nyaraka A76/7 Rev.1 - Ripoti iliyounganishwa kutoka kwa Mkurugenzi Mkuu. Azimio kuhusu kuimarisha uwezo wa utambuzi.

translations.source: On 26 May Member States endorsed a resolution to strengthen diagnostics capacity in countres and to improve access to diagnostic services. The broad ranging resolution recognizes that diagnostic services are vital for the prevention, surveillance, diagnosis, case management, monitoring and treatment of communicable, noncommunicable, neglected tropical and rare diseases, injuries, and disabilities. Diagnostics allow for the precise identification of diseases, and therefore the timely initiation of the correct treatments for better health outcomes. The resolution considers the full spectrum of “diagnostics”, thus including both “in vitro” laboratory tests e.g. rapid diagnostic tests and polymerase chain reaction (PCR) and “non in vitro” diagnostics e.g. imaging or blood pressure measurement devices. It covers actions for research and development, manufacturing (including local production and technology transfer), regulation, selection and procurement, awareness, advocacy and addressing access barriers in general. The implementation of the resolution will build and expand on previous and current work at three levels of WHO to help countries improve access to diagnostic services. The Secretariat is requested to report on implementation progress in 2025. Related document EB152/6 Strengthening diagnostics capacity
translations.reference: Tarehe 26 Mei nchi wanachama ziliidhinisha Azimio la kuimarisha uwezo wa uchunguzi katika nchi na kuboresha upatikanaji wa huduma za uchunguzi. Azimio pana linatambua kuwa huduma za uchunguzi ni muhimu kwa ajili ya kuzuia, ufuatiliaji na uchunguzi, udhibiti wa visa, ufuatiliaji na matibabu ya magonjwa ya kuambukiza, yasiyo ya kuambukiza, yaliyopuuzwa na ya kawaida, majeraha na ulemavu. Uchunguzi huruhusu utambuzi sahihi wa magonjwa, na hivyo kuanzishwa kwa matibabu sahihi kwa matokeo bora ya kiafya kwa wakati unaofaa. Azimio hilo linazingatia wigo kamili wa "Uchunguzi", hivyo kujumuisha vipimo vya maabara vya "in vitro" m.f vipimo vya haraka vya uchunguzi na mmenyuko wa mnyororo wa Polymerase (PCR) na uchunguzi wa "non in vitro" m.f picha au vifaa vya kupima shinikizo la damu. Linashughulikia hatua za utafiti na maendeleo, utengenezaji (ikijumuishi uzalishaji wa ndani na uhamishaji wa teknolojia), udhibiti, uteuzi na ununuzi, uhamishaji, utetezi na kushughulikia vizuizi vya ufikiaji kwa ujumla. Utekelezaji wa Azimio hilo utajenga na kupanua kasi ya awali na ya sasa katika ngazi tatu za WHO ili kuzisaidia nchi kuboresha upatikanaji wa huduma za uchunguzi. Sekretarieti imeombwa kutoa taarifa ya maendeleo ya utekelezaji mwaka 2025. Hati inayohusiana EB 152/6 Kuimarisha uwezo wa uchunguzi
translations.hypothesis: Mnamo 26 Mei, mataifa ya wanachama walithibitisha azimio la kuimarisha uwezo wa utambuzi katika nchi, na kuboresha upatikanaji wa huduma za utambuzi. Azimio hili lenye umbo kubwa linaangazia kwamba huduma za utambuzi ni muhimu kwa kuzuia, kutambua, usimamizi wa kesi,wachungili na matibabu ya magonjwa yenye uenezaji, magonjwa isiyoelezwa, magonjwa ya kitropiki yaliyothamani, na magonjwa, jeraha, na ulemavu. Utambuzi huruhusu utambuzi sahihi wa magonjwa, na hivyo kuwezesha uanzishaji wa matibabu sahihi kwa matokeo bora ya afya. Azimio hili linaangazia "utambuzi" kikamilifu, kwa hivyo lina jumuisha "utambuzi wa nje" kama vile vipimo vya utambuzi haraka na polymerase chain reaction (PCR), na "utambuzi wa ndani" kama vile vifaa vya picha au vipimo vya shinikizo la damu. Linalenga hatua za utafiti na maendeleo, uzalishaji (ikiwa ni pamoja na uzalishaji wa ndani na ubadilishaji wa teknolojia), uthibitisho, uteuzi na ununuzi, uelewa, utetezi, na kushughulikia vizuizi katika upatikanaji kwa ujumla. Utekelezaji wa azimio hili utaendeleza na kuongeza kazi iliyopo katika ngazi tatu za WHO ili kusaidia nchi kuboresha upatikanaji wa huduma za utambuzi. Sekretariat limewasilishwawa kuwa ripoti kuhusu maendeleo ya utekelezaji mwaka wa 2025. Nyaraka iliyo kuhusika EB152/6 Kuimarisha uwezo wa utambuzi

translations.source: Awards for outstanding contributions to public health presented during the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly During a moving ceremony at the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly in Geneva, awards were presented to persons and institutions from around the world for their outstanding contributions to public health. “The 2023 public health prizes and awards celebrate people who have made a significant contribution to global health, and whose work has extended far beyond the call of normal duty,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General. “At a time when the world faces many challenges, each is an inspiration and a reminder of the progress that can be made to improve health and wellbeing for all.” The call for nominations of candidates for each prize is sent out each year after closure of the World Health Assembly. Nominations can be made by national health administrations of a WHO Member State and by any former recipient of the prizes. At its 152nd session in January 2023, the Executive Board designated the 2023 winners of the prizes, on the basis of proposals made by the dedicated selection panels for each prize. The seven laureates have been selected to celebrate their unique role and contribution for public health in their countries and globally. They come from four WHO Regions – for the Americas, the Eastern-Mediterranean, South-East Asia and the Western Pacific. Five winners are individuals, and three among them are women.
translations.reference: Tuzo za michango bora kwa afya ya umma ilitolewa wakati wa mkutano wa sabini na Sita wa afya Duniani. Wakati wa hafla ya kusisimua katika mkutano wa Sabini na Sita wa afya Ulimwenguni huko Jeniva, tuzo zilitolewa kwa watu na taasisi kutoka kote Ulimwenguni kwa michango yao bora kwa afya ya umma. "Zawadi na Tuzo za heshima za afya ya umma za 2023 zinaadhimisha watu ambao wametoa mchango mkubwa kwa afya ya kimataifa, na ambazo kazi yao imeenea zaidi ya wito wa kawaida", alisema Dk Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, mkurugenzi mkuu wa WHO. "Wakati ambapo unakabiliwa na changamoto nyingi, kila mmoja ni msukumo na ukumbusho wa maendeleo ambayo yanaweza kufanywa kuboresha afya na ustawi kwa wote" Wito wa uteuzi wa wagombeaji kwa kila zawadi hutumwa kila mwaka baada ya kufungwa kwa mkutano wa afya Duniani. Uteuzi unaweza kufanywa na tawala za kitaifa za afya za nchi mwanachama wa WHO na mpokeaji yeyote wa zamani wa zawadi. Katika kikao chake cha 152 mnamo Januari 2023, halmashauri kuu iliteua washindi wa 2023 wa Tuzo, kwa msingi wa mapendekezo yaliyotolewa na jopo maalumu la utetezi kwa kila Tuzo. Washindi saba wamechaguliwa kusherekea jukumu na mchango wao wa kipekee kwa afya ya umma kwa nchi zao na kimataifa. Wanatoka kanda nne za WHO. Amerika, Mashariki mwa Mediterania, Asia ya kusini- Mashariki na Pasifiki Magharibi. Washindi watano ni watu binafsi na watatu kati yao ni wanawake.
translations.hypothesis: Tuzo za ubunifu katika afya ya umma zilitolewa wakati wa Mkutano wa Sita-saba wa Afya ya Dunia. Katika sherehe ya kusisimua wakati wa Mkutano wa Sita-saba wa Afya ya Dunia huko Geneva, tuzo zilitolewa kwa watu na taasisi kutoka kote ulimwenguni kwa contribution zao kubwa katika afya ya umma. "Tuzo za afya za 2023 zinatoa heshima kwa watu ambao wamefanya contribution kubwa katika afya ya dunia, na ambao kazi zao zimepanda zaidi kuliko wajibu wa kawaida," alisema Dkt. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa WHO. "Katika wakati ambapo dunia inakumbana na changamoto nyingi, kila mtu ni motisha na kumbukumbu ya maendeleo ambayo yanaweza kufanyika ili kuboresha afya na ustawi kwa wote." Ombi la kuandika wasomaji wa tuzo kila mwaka hutolewa baada ya Mkutano wa Afya ya Dunia. Wasomaji wanaweza kutolewa na mashirika ya afya ya kitaifa ya Mwanachama wa WHO, na na wale waliopewa tuzo hapo awali. Katika kikao chake cha 152 mnamo Januari 2023, Bodi ya Uaguzi ilichagua washindi wa tuzo za 2023, kulingana na mbinu zilizotolewa na bodi za uteuzi maalumu za kila tuzo. Washindi saba wamechaguliwa ili kutaja jukumu na contribution yao ya kipekee katika afya ya umma katika nchi zao na kimataifa. Wao vinatoka katika eneo la WHO la Amerika, Mashariki ya Kati, Asia Mashariki, na Pasifiki Magharibi. Washindi sita ni watu, na watatu kati yao ni wanawake.

translations.source: In addition, the two institutions that have received a 2023 award are led by women. Winners of the 2023 prizes Sasakawa Health PrizeThe 2023 laureates: The Nick Simons Institute from Nepal, and Professor Vichai Tienthavorn from Thailand The Nick Simons Institute is a nongovernmental organization aiming to improve health care in the rural areas of Nepal. Working closely with the Ministry of Health and Population of Nepal, the Institute has trained 7000 medical professionals (such as midwives and anaesthetic assistants) in rural areas, who now provide most-needed services to local communities in the absence of a sufficient pool of general practitioners and specialists. The Institute has supplied essential equipment and provided additional health personnel to alleviate the lack of medical professionals in 44 hospitals, and supported the design of an action plan for better quality services in more than 100 rural hospitals. The Institute also conducts research and advocacy activities to shape perceptions and influence policies that affect rural health workers in Nepal. Professor Vichai Tienthavorn is President of the Praboromarajchanok Institute at the Ministry of Public Health of Thailand. One of the nation-wide initiatives he has led is an innovative health promotion policy to help address thalassemia, with his work resulting in the adoption of an effective national policy for thalassemia prevention and control. He also designed an effective communications tool and screening method to help citizens to adapt their behaviours in order to prevent and control diabetes and hypertension. As a result of this work, a national policy was adopted with significant positive impact on the country’s disease burden.
translations.reference: Aidha, taasisi hizo mbili ambazo zimepokea tuzo ya 2023 zinaongozwa nawanawake. Washindi wa Tuzo za 2023 za Sasakawa Health Prize washindi wa 2023: Taasisi ya Nick Simons kutoka Nepal, na profesa Vichai Tienthavorn kutoka Thailand Taasisi ya Nick Simons ni shirika lisilo la kiserikali linalolenga kuboresha huduma za afya katika maeneo ya vijijini ya Nepali. Ikifanya kazi kwa karibu na wizara ya afya na idadi ya watu ya Nepali, taasisi imetoa mafunzo kwa wataalamu wa matibabu 7000 (kama vile wakunga, na wasaidizi wa ganzi) katika maeneo yote ya vijijini, ambao sasa wanatoa huduma zinazohitajika zaidi kwa jamii za wenyeji bila kukosekana kwa kundi la kutosha la jumla la watendaji na wataalamu. Taasisi imetoa vifaa muhimu na kutoa watumishi wa ziada wa afya ili kupunguza ukosefu wa wataalamu wa matibabu katika hospitali 44, na kuunga mkono uundaji wa mpango kazi wa huduma bora zaidi katika hospitali zaidi ya 100 za vijijini. Pia taasisi hufanya shughuli za utafiti na utetezi ili kuunda mitazamo na kuathiri sera zinazoathiri wahudumu wa afya vijijini nchini Nepali. Profes Vichai Tienthavorn ni Rais wa taasisi ya Praboromarajchanok katika wizara ya afya ya umma ya Thailand. Moja wapo ya mipango ya kitaifa ambayo ameoiongoza ni sera bunifu ya kukuza afya ili kusaidia kushughulikia thalassemia, na kazi yake ikisababishwa kupitishwa kwa sera madhubuti ya kitaifa ya kuzuia na kudhibiti thelassemia. Pia alibuni chombo madhubuti cha mawasiliano na njia ya uchunguzi ili kuwasaidia wananchi kurekebisha tabia zao ili kuzuia na kudhibiti kisukari na shinikizo la damu. Kama matokeo ya kazi hii, sera ya kitaifa ilipitishwa yenye matokeo chanya kwa mzigo wa magonjwa nchini.
translations.hypothesis: Zaidi ya hayo, taasisi mbili ambazo zimepata tuzo ya 2023 viongozi wanawake. Washindi wa tuzo za Sasakawa Health: Washindi wa tuzo za 2023: Chuo cha Nick Simons kutoka Nepal, na Profesa Vichai Tienthavorn kutoka Thailand. Chuo cha Nick Simons ni taasisi isiyo ya serikali ambayo ina lengo la kuboresha huduma za afya katika maeneo ya vijijini huko Nepal. Ikifanya kazi kwa karibu na Wizara ya Afya na Umma ya Nepal, chuo hicho kinaoima wataalamu wa matibabu (kama wa watumishi na msaidizi wa tiba) katika maeneo ya vijijini, ambao sasa wanatoa huduma muhimu kwa jamii za eneo katika kutokuwepo kwa idadi ya wataalamu wa matibabu na wataalamu. Chuo hicho kinaotoa vifaa muhimu na pia kinaongeza wataalamu wa afya ili kupunguza ukosefu wa wataalamu wa matibabu katika hospitali 44, na pia kinaunga mkono muundo wa mpango wa hatua kwa huduma bora katika hospitali zaidi ya 100 za vijijini. Chuo hicho pia kinaendesha shughuli za utafiti na uendelezaji ili kuunda mtazamo na kuathiri sera ambazo zinaathiri wafanyakazi wa afya katika Nepal. Profesa Vichai Tienthavorn ni Rais wa Chuo cha Praboromarajchanok katika Wizara ya Afya ya Taifa ya Thailand. Moja ya matumizi yake ya kitaifa ni sera ya uendelezaji afya inayotumika, ambayo ina lengo la kusaidia kushughulikia thalassemia, na kazi yake imeleta utumiaji wa sera ya kitaifa yenye ufanisi kwa kuzuia na kudhibiti thalassemia. Pia, ameunda chombo cha mawasiliano na njia ya utambuzi yenye ufanisi ili kusaidia raia kubadilisha tabia zao ili kuzuia na kudhibiti ugonjwa wa sukari na shinikizo la damu. Matokeo ya kazi hii, sera ya kitaifa iliyopata athari kubwa katika mzigo wa magonjwa wa nchi.

translations.source: Professor Tienthavorn also played an essential role in addressing the challenge of uneven distribution of the health workforce, especially in border and rural areas of Thailand. He led the establishment of partnerships with village schools to recruit high-school students, train them and help them settle back locally after having accomplished an accelerated medical curriculum. United Arab Emirates Health Foundation Prize2023 award laureate: Dr Maria Asuncion Silvestre from the PhilippinesIn addition to being a renowned clinician and researcher, Dr Maria Asuncion Silvestre is a passionate advocate for exclusive breastfeeding and the founder of Kalusugan ng Mag-Ina (Health of Mother and Child) – a Philippine non-governmental organization. Dr Silvestre has leveraged her experience as a community practitioner to conduct research and design a protocol to help improve the health of mothers and newborns. The pioneering protocol she created describes a simple set of actions to be undertaken by health workers attending a mother during delivery and her newborn after birth. This protocol, which is applicable in all resource settings, helps to bridge the health equity gap in mother-and-child care. In partnership with the national government of the Philippines as well as 17 countries in the WHO Western Pacific Region, she has played a key role in scaling up the First Embrace campaign for Early Essential Newborn Care – a set of simple WHO-recommended and cost-effective interventions. His Highness Sheikh Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah Prize for Research in Health Care for the Elderly and in Health Promotion 2023 award laureates: The National Center for Chronic and Noncommunicable Disease Control and Prevention from China; and Dr Abla Mehio Sibai from Lebanon The National Center for Chronic and Noncommunicable Disease Control and Prevention, part of the Chinese Center for Disease Control and Prevention (China CDC), has hosted a department focusing on the health of older people since 2013.
translations.reference: Profesa Tienthavorn pia alichukua jukumu muhimu katika kushughulikia changamoto ya usambazaji usio sawa wa wahudumu wa afya, hususani maeneo ya mipakani na vijijini ya Thailand. Aliongoza kuanzishwa kwa ushirikiano na shule za vijijini ili kuajiri wanafunzi wa shule za upili, kuwafundisha na kuwasaidia kutulia ndani baada ya kukamilisha mtaala wa matibabu ulioharakishwa. Umoja wa Falme za Kiarabu Health Foundation Tuzo ya 2023 mshindi wa Tuzo: Dk Maria Asuncion Silvestre kutoka Ufilipino pamoja na kuwa daktari na mtafiti mashuhuri, Dk Maria Asuncion Silvetre ni mtetezi mwenye shauku ya unyonyeshaji wa maziwa ya mama pekee na mwanzilishi wa Kalusugan ng Mag-Ina (Afya ya Mama na Mtoto) - shirika lisilo la kiserikali la Ufilipino. DK Silvestre ametumia uzoefu wake kama mtendaji wa jamii kufanya utafiti na kubuni itifaki ya kusaidia kuboresha afya ya mama na watoto wachanga. Itifaki ya uanzilishi aliyounda inaeleza seti rahisi ya hatua zinazopaswa kufanywa na wahudumu wa afya wanaomhudumia mama wakati wa kujifungua na mtoto wake mchanga baada ya kuzaliwa. Itifaki hii, ambayo inatumika katika mipangilio yote ya rasilimali, inasaidia kuziba pengo la usawa wa afya katika utunzaji wa mama na mtoto. Kwa ushirikiano na serikali ya kitaifa ya Ufilipino pamoja na nchi 17 katika Kanda ya Pasifiki ya Magharibi ya WHO, amefanya jukumu muhimu katika kuongeza kampeni ya Kukumbatia kwanza kwa utunzaji muhimu wa waoto Wachanga Mapema- seti ya hatua rahisi zinazopendekezwa na WHO na za gharama nafuu. Muadhama Sheikh Sabah Al- Ahmad Al-Jaber Al- Sabah Tuzo ya utafiti kwa huduma za afya kwa wazee na ukuzaji wa afya Washindi wa tuzo za 2023: Kituo cha kitaifa cha kudhibiti na kuzuia magonjwa ya muda mrefu na yasiyoambukiza kutoka China; Dk Abla Mehio Sibai kutoka Lebanoni Kituo cha kitaifa cha kudhibiti na kuzuia magonjwa ya muda mrefu na yasiyoambukiza, ambacho ni sehemu ya kituo cha kudhibiti na kuzuia magonjwa cha China (CDC cha China), kimeandaa idara inayoangazia afya ya wazee tangu 2013.
translations.hypothesis: Profesa Tienthavorn pia alicheza jukumu muhimu katika kushughulikia tatizo la usambazaji usawa wa wafanyakazi wa afya, haswa katika eneo la mipaka na maeneo ya vijijini nchini Thailand. Aliongoza ushirikishwaji na shule za vijijini ili kukusanya wanafunzi wa shule ya upili, kuelekeza, na kusaidia wanafunzi hao kurudi kwenye jamii baada ya kukamilisha kozi ya tiba ya haraka. Tuzo ya Asasi ya Afya ya Uarabuni Kusini 2023: Dkt Maria Asuncion Silvestre kutoka Philippines. Mbali na kuwa daktari na mtafiti mashuhuri, Dkt Maria Asuncion Silvestre ni mshauri mwenye shauku kuhusu ujiko wa kipekee na mwanzilishi wa Kalusugan ng Mag-Ina (Afya ya Mama na Mtoto) – taasisi isiyo ya serikali nchini Philippines. Dkt Silvestre amekitumia uzoefu wake kama mtaalamu wa jamii ili kufanya utafiti na kuunda kanuni ambayo itasaidia kuboresha afya ya wazazi na watoto. Kanuni hii, ambayo inaweza kutumika katika kila mazingira, inawezesha kupunguza tofauti katika huduma za afya kwa wazazi na watoto. Kwa ushirikiano na serikali ya kitaifa ya Philippines, pamoja na nchi 17 katika eneo la WHO la Pasifiki Magharibi, amechukua jukumu muhimu katika kuendeleza kampeni ya "First Embrace" kwa huduma muhimu za wote – seti ya tiba za rahisi ambazo zinaombwa na WHO na zina gharama nafuu. Tuzo ya Jeho His Highness Sheikh Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah kwa utafiti katika huduma za afya kwa wazee na katika uendelezaji wa afya 2023: Taasisi ya Kitaifa ya Udhibiti na Mipingo ya Magonjwa ya Kudumu na Asiyoweza Kutofautishwa kutoka China; na Dkt Abla Mehio Sibai kutoka Lebanon. Taasisi ya Kitaifa ya Udhibiti na Mipingo ya Magonjwa ya Kudumu na Asiyoweza Kutofautishwa, ambayo ni sehemu ya Taasisi ya Kitaifa ya Udhibiti na Mipingo ya Magonjwa (China CDC), imekuwa ikiendesha idara inayofanya kazi tangu 2013.

translations.source: It delivers a broad range of programmes and activities that advance health promotion for older people, ranging from better understanding the causes of morbidity and mortality through national surveillance for noncommunicable diseases, surveys, death registries and research, to tailored programmes to promote health literacy and evidence-based policies. Initiatives include a dedicated toolkit for older people, capacity‑building of 2000 primary care staff, a health advocacy week dedicated to older people, and an innovative project to improve the mental and cognitive health of more than half a million older persons in both urban and rural areas. Dr Abla Mehio Sibai is Professor of Epidemiology and Dean of the Faculty of Health Sciences at the American University of Beirut in Lebanon. She has made an outstanding contribution to older people’s health in Lebanon and the region, developing a holistic approach to the promotion of healthy ageing. She led the innovative initiative of enrolling close to 600 older people every year at the University for Seniors at the American University of Beirut, in addition to training public health professionals. She co-led the landmark WHO Global Burden of Disease Study in Lebanon (2000) and conducted the first national survey on noncommunicable diseases and risk factors, informing advocacy, policy-making and programme planning for health promotion. Building on her numerous achievements, Dr Sibai has developed the “National Strategy for Older Persons” in Lebanon (2020–2030). Dr Sibai also created the Arab Ageing Network and the Centre for Studies on Ageing to create links between research and policy at the national, regional and international levels. Dr LEE Jong-wook Memorial Prize for Public Health 2023 award laureate: Dr Jorge Francisco Meneses from Guatemala
translations.reference: Inatoa mipango na shughuli mbalimbali zinazoendeleza uimarishaji wa afya kwa wazee, kuanzia kuelewa vyema zaidi sababu za magonjwa na vifo kupitia uchunguzi wa kitaifa wa magonjwa yasiyoambukiza, tafiti, sajili za vifo na utafiti, hadi programu maalamu za kukuza ujuzi wa kiafya naushahidi- sera za msingi. Mipango ni pamoja na zana maalumu kwa ajili ya wazee, kujenga uwezo wa wafanyakazi 2000 wa huduma ya msingi, wiki ya utetezi wa afya inayotolewa kwa wazee, na mradi wa ubunifu wa kuboresha afya ya akili na uchunguzi ya wazee zaidi ya nusu milioni kwa maeneo yote ya mijini na vijijini. Dk Abla Mehio Sibai ni profesa wa epidemiolojia na mkuu wa kitivo cha sayansi ya afya katika chuo kikuu cha Marekani Beiruti nchini Lebanoni. Ametoa mchango mkubwa kwa afya ya wazee nchini Lebanoni na kanda, akiendeleza mbinu ya kukuza uzee wenye afya. Aliongoza mpango wa ubunifu kwa kuandikisha karibu wazee 600 kila mwaka katika chuo kikuu cha wazee ndani ya chuo kikuu cha Marekani cha Beiruti, pamoja na kutoa mafunzo kwa wataalamu wa afya ya umma. Aliongoza utafiti wa mzigo wa magonjwa ulimwenguni wa WHO nchini Lebanoni (2000) na kufanya utafiti wa kwanza wa kitaifa kuhusu magonjwa yasiyoambukiza na mambo hatarishi, kuarifu utetezi, utungaji sera na upangaji wa programu kwa ajili ya kukuza afya. Kwa kuzingatia mafanikio yake mengi, Dk Sibai ameandaa "mkakati wa kitaifa kwa wazee" nchini Lebanoni (2020-2023). Dk Sibai pia aliunda mtandao wa wazee wa kiarabu na kituo cha mafunzo ya uzeeni ili kuunda uhusiano kati ya utafiti na sera katika ngazi ya kitaifa, kikanda na kimataifa. Dk LEE Jong-Wook tuzo ya ukumbusho ya afya ya umma Mshindi wa tuzo ya 2023: Dk Jorge Francisco Meneses kutoka Guatemala.
translations.hypothesis: Hutoa programu na shughuli mbalimbali ambazo husaidia kukuza afya kwa watu wazee, kuanzia uelewa bora wa sababu za ugonjwa na vifo kupitia utunzaji wa kitaifa wa magonjwa isiyoweza kuambukizwa, tafiti, rekodi za vifo na utafiti, hadi programu maalum za kukuza uelewa wa afya na sera za msingi. Mbinu zinajumuisha seti maalum kwa watu wazee, kujenga uwezo wa wafanyakazi wa huduma ya kitaifunzi, wiki maalum kwa watu wazee, na mradi mpya wa kuboresha afya ya akili na ya akili kwa zaidi ya milioni moja ya watu wazee katika maeneo ya mijini na mijini. Dkt Abla Mehio Sibai ni profesa wa Epidemiolojia na mkurugenzi wa Shule ya Sayansi ya Afya katika Chuo Kikuu cha Beirut nchini Lebanon. Amewezesha michango makubwa katika afya ya watu wazee nchini Lebanon na katika eneo, kwa kuendeleza mbinu kamili ya kukuza afya. Aliongoza mradi mpya wa kuanisajili karibu watu 600 kila mwaka katika Chuo cha Watu Wazee katika Chuo Kikuu cha Beirut, pamoja na mafunzo kwa wataalamu wa afya. Aliongoza pia utafiti wa kitaifa wa WHO kuhusu "Makubwa ya Magonjwa" nchini Lebanon (2000) na ulizindua tafiti ya kwanza kuhusu magonjwa isiyoweza kuambukizwa na hatari. Hii ilisaidia katika usindikaji, uundaji sera na kupanga programu za kukuza afya. Kulingana na mafanikio yake, Dkt Sibai amekua "Mkakati wa Kitaifa kwa Watu Wazee" nchini Lebanon (2020–2030). Dkt Sibai pia alianzisha "Mtandao wa Watu Wazee wa Kiarabu" na "Kituo cha Utafiti wa Watu Wazee" ili kuunda uhusiano kati ya utafiti na sera katika viwango vya kitaifa, za eneo na za kimataifa. Tuzo ya "Dr LEE Jong-wook Memorial Prize for Public Health 2023" imetoa: Dkt Jorge Francisco Meneses kutoka Guatemala

translations.source: Having promoted community participation in hospital care for over 20 years, Dr Jorge Francisco Meneses set up community-based committees focusing on the safety and satisfaction of patients, their families and the community. Given the positive impact of his work in improving the quality of patient care, the model of ethical and patient-centred care that he designed was scaled up at the national level. Nowadays, as the national supervisor for hospitals of Guatemala, he has designed a programme to improve the quality of services for hospital patients and their families. Dr Meneses has recently coordinated an innovative pilot project in the Guatemala South Health Area to build the first national integrated network of health services, with a priority focus on underserved communities. His work led to the adoption of a national strategy of integrated health services networks, the first in Central America. Nelson Mandela Award for Health Promotion 2023 award laureate: Dr Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma from Bahrain In addition to being the Chief Executive Officer of the National Health Regulatory Authority of Bahrain, Dr Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma has held various leadership positions in government and academic institutions in her country. Dr Al Jalahma has played a major role in the development of numerous national and region-wide strategies and plans in the field of primary healthcare, child and adolescent health, chronic diseases and antismoking. In her current role, Dr Al Jalahma has led major successful initiatives, such as the national accreditation system for health institutions, the digital transformation of the National Health Regulatory Authority, and several initiatives leading to increased efficiency and excellence in the health sector.
translations.reference: Baada ya kukuza ushiriki wa jamii katika huduma za hospitali kwa zaidi ya miaka 20, Dk Jorge Francisco Meneses alianzisha kamati za kijamii zinazozingatia usalama na kuridhika kwa wagonjwa, familia zao na jamii. kutokana na matokeo chanya ya kazi yake katika kuboresha ubora wa huduma kwa wagonjwa, kielelezo cha utunzaji wa kimaadili na mgonjwa alioubuni ulikuzwa katika ngazi ya kitaifa. Siku hizi, akiwa kama msimamizi wa kitaifa wa hospitali za Guatemala, amebuni mpango wa kuboresha ubora wa huduma kwa wagonjwa wa hospitlini na familia zao. Dk Meneses hivi karibuni ameratibu mradi wa majaribio wa kibunifu katika eneo la afya la Guatemala kusini ili kujenga mtandao wa kwanza wa kitaifa wa huduma ya afya, kwa kuzingatia kipaumbele kwa jamii ambazo hazijahudumiwa. Kazi yake ilisababisha kupitishwa kwa mkakati wa kitaifa wa mitandao ya huduma ya Afya jumuishi, ya kwanza huko Amerika ya kati. Tuzo ya Nelson mandela ya kukuza afya Mshindi wa tuzo ya 2023: Dk Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma kutoka Bahrain Pamoja na kuwa afisa mtendaji mkuu wa mamlaka ya kitaifa ya udhibiti wa afya ya Bahrain, Dk Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma ameshika nyadhifa mbalimbali za uongozi katika serikali na taasisi za kitaaluma nchini mwake. Dk Al Jalahma amekuwa na mchango mkubwa katika ukuzaji wa mikakati na mipango mingi ya kitaifa na kikanda katika nyanja ya afya ya msingi, afya ya watoto na vijana, magonjwa sugu na uachaji wa uvutaji sigara. Katika nafasi yake ya sasa, Dk A Jalahma ameongoza mipango mikuu yenye mafanikio, kama vile mfumo wa kitaifa wa ithibati kwa taasisi za afya, na mipango kadhaa inayosababisha kuongezeka kwa fursa na ubora katika sekta ya afya.
translations.hypothesis: بعد kuwa amehimiza ushiriki wa jamii katika huduma za hospitali kwa zaidi ya miaka 20, Dk Jorge Francisco Meneses alianzisha komiti za jamii, ambazo zinaangazia usalama na kuridhika kwa wagonjwa, familia zao na jamii. Kwa kuzingatia athari chanya ya kazi yake katika kuboresha ubora wa huduma za wagonjwa, mfumo wa huduma za kitaalamu na za wagenjwa ambao alounda, uliongezwa katika viwango vya kitaifa. Hivi sasa, kama mshauri wa kitaifa kwa hospitali za Guatemala, ameweka mpango wa kuboresha ubora wa huduma kwa wagonjwa na familia zao. Hivi majuzi, Dk Meneses alishiriki katika mradi wa kipekee katika eneo la afya la kusini mwa Guatemala, ili kujenga mtandao wa huduma za afya wa kitaifa, na umwelekeo wa kwanza ni jamii ambazo hazipata huduma. Kazi yake ilianzisha matumizi ya mkakati wa kitaifa wa mtandao wa huduma za afya, ambao ni wa kwanza katika Afrika Mashariki. Tuzo ya Nelson Mandela kwa Uendelezaji wa Afya 2023: Dk Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma kutoka Bahari. Zaidi ya kuwa Mkurugenzi Mkuu wa Taasisi ya Sheria za Afya ya Bahari, Dk Mariam Athbi Al Jalahma amekuwa na nafasi mbalimbali za uongozi katika taasisi za serikali na za elimu nchini. Dk Al Jalahma amechukua jukumu muhimu katika utayarishaji wa mikakati na mipango kadhaa katika eneo la huduma ya afya ya msingi, afya ya watoto na vijana, magonjwa ya kudumu na kupinga tabibu. Katika jukumu lake sasa, Dk Al Jalahma amefuata mashughuli kubwa na mafanikio, kama vile mfumo wa uthibitisho wa kitaifa kwa taasisi za afya, mabadiliko ya dijitali ya Taasisi ya Sheria za Afya ya Kitaifa, na mashughuli kadhaa ambazo zinaongoza kwenye ufanisi na ubora wa kipekee katika sekta ya afya.

translations.source: She is also a prominent voice for health promotion across various channels throughout all countries of the Gulf Cooperation Council.
translations.reference: Pia yeye ni mtu maarufu kwa ajili kukuza afya katika njia mbalimbali katika nchi zote za Baraza la ushirikiano la Ghuba.
translations.hypothesis: Pia, yeye ni sauti muhimu katika uenezi wa afya katika njia mbalimbali katika nchi zote za Baraza la Ushirikiano la Ghuba.

translations.source: WHO and Republic of Korea sign landmark agreement to boost biomanufacturing capacity WHO and the Republic of Korea have signed a Memorandum of Understanding to establish a global training hub in biomanufacturing. This global training centre will serve all low- and middle-income countries (LMICs) to produce biologicals, such as vaccines, insulin, monoclonal antibodies, and cancer medicines. The COVID-19 pandemic highlighted the need to expand the local and regional production of vaccines and other essential health products in LMICs to ensure equitable access. To provide countries with the know-how to rapidly produce mRNA vaccines, WHO, in collaboration with partners, established the mRNA Technology Transfer programme, with the formal inauguration of the Hub facility in South Africa in April 2023. This multilateral effort and other recent local production initiatives call for ambitious workforce development strategies to recruit, upskill and retain the staff working at these facilities, with unique competencies required in bioproduction. To address this gap, WHO and the Republic of Korea have engaged in closed collaboration for over a year and are now formalizing their commitment towards the establishment of a global training hub in biomanufacturing. “We are delighted to sign this Memorandum of Understanding to elevate our partnership to the next level and collaborate in the development of a comprehensive training curriculum. We hope this world-class training hub will help to build a skilled workforce and ensure quality health products can be manufactured around the world,” said Dr Yukiko Nakatani, WHO Assistant Director-General, Access to Medicines and Health Products. The Government of the Republic of Korea is offering a large range of national training facilities and programmes covering the full spectrum of biological manufacturing and is expanding its operations to accommodate more trainees from other countries with the construction of a Global Bio Education Campus to be launched in 2025.
translations.reference: WHO na Jamhuri ya watu wa Korea zatia saini makubaliano ya kihistoria ili kuongeza uwezo wa utengenezaji wa Viumbe hai WHO na Jamhuri ya watu wa korea zimetia saini mkataba wa maelewano ili kuanzisha kitovu cha mafunzo cha kimataifa katika utengenezaji wa viumbe hai. Kituo hiki cha mafunzo cha kimataifa kitahudumia nchi zote za kipato cha chini na cha kati (LMICs) kuzalisha Biolojia kama vile Insulin, kinga za monokloni na dawa za saratani. Janga la UVIKO-19 liliangazia hitaji la kupanua uzalishaji wa ndani na wa kikanda wa chanjo na bidhaa nyingine muhimu za afya katika LMICs ili kuhakikisha ufikiaji sawa. Ili kuzipa nchi ujuzi wa kuzalisha Chanjo za mRNA kwa haraka, WHO, kwa kushirikiana na washirika, ilianzisha mpango wa uhawilishaji Teknolojia wa mRNA, na uzinduzi rasmi wa kituo cha Hub nchini Afrika Kusini mwezi Aprili 2023. Juhudi hizi za kimataifa na mipango mingine ya hivi karibuni ya uzalishaji wa ndani inataka mikakati kabambe ya maendeleo ya wafanyakazi ili kuajiri, kuongeza ujuzi na kuhifadhi wafanyakazi wanaofanya kazi katia vituo hivi,na umahiri wa kipekee unaohitajika katika uzalishaji wa viumbe hai. Ili kukabiliana na pengo hili, WHO na Jamhuri ya korea zimeshirikiana kwa karibu kwa zaidi ya mwaka mmoja na sasa zinarasimisha dhamira yao ya kuanzishwa kwa kitovu cha mafunzo cha kimataifa katika utengenezaji wa viumbe hai. "Tunayo furaha kutia saini mkataba huu wa makubaliano ili kuinua ushirikiano wetu hadi ngazi nyengine na kushirikiana katika utayarishaji wa mtaala mpana wa mafunzo. Tunatarajia kitovu hiki cha mafunzo cha hadhi ya kimataifa kitasaidia kujenga nguvu kazi yenye ujuzi na kuhakikisha bidhaa bora za afya zinaweza kutengenezwa Duniani kote", alisema DK Yukiko Nakatani, mkurugenzi mkuu msaidizi wa WHO, upatikanaji wa dawa na bidhaa za afya. Serikali ya Jamhuri ya Korea inatoa anuwai kubwa ya vifaa vya mafunzo ya kitaifa na programu zinazohusu wigo kamili wa utengenezaji wa kibiolojia na inapanua shughuli zake ili kuchukua wanafunzi zaidi kutoka nchi nyingine kwa ujenzi wa kampasi ya elimu ya viumbe hai ya kimataifa itakayozinduliwa mnamo 2025.
translations.hypothesis: WHO na Jamhuri ya Korea zinaunga mkono mkataba muhimu ili kuongeza uwezo wa uzalishaji wa bidhaa za biolojia. Mkataba huu una lengo la kuanzisha kituo cha mafunzo kimataifa katika uzalishaji wa bidhaa za biolojia. Kituo hiki cha mafunzo kimataifa kitatoa huduma kwa nchi zilizo na uchumi mdogo na wa katikati (LMICs) ili kuzalisha bidhaa za biolojia, kama vile chanjo, insulini, antibodies, na dawa za saratani. Janga la COVID-19 liliweka alama umuhimu wa kuongeza uzalishaji wa chanjo na bidhaa muhimu za afya katika LMICs ili kuhakikisha upatikanaji sawa. Ili kutoa nchi maarifa kuhusu uundaji wa haraka wa chanjo za mRNA, WHO, kwa ushirikiano na washiriki, imanzisha programu ya ubadilishaji wa teknolojia za mRNA, na rasmi kufungua kituo hicho nchini Afrika Kusini mnamo Aprili 2023. Juhudi hii ya kimataifa na mashinani, pamoja na inisi za hivi karibuni za uzalishaji, zinaitaji mikakati ya kutoa fursa kwa ajili ya kukusanya, kukuza, na kudumisha wafanyakazi wanaofanya kazi katika vituo hivi, ambapo kuna mahali pa hisabu maalum katika uzalishaji wa bidhaa za biolojia. Ili kushughulikia hitaji hili, WHO na Jamhuri ya Korea zinafanya ushirikiano wa karibu kwa zaidi ya mwaka, na sasa wanaendelea na ahadi yao ya kuanzisha kituo cha mafunzo kimataifa katika uzalishaji wa bidhaa za biolojia. "Tuna furaha kusaini mkataba huu ili kuimarisha ushirikano wetu na kushirikiana katika kuendeleza programu ya mafunzo kamili. Tunatumai kwamba kituo hiki cha mafunzo cha kiwango cha dunia kitasaidia kujenga wafanyakazi wenye ujuzi na kuhakikisha kuwa bidhaa za afya bora zinaweza kuzalishwa duniani," alisema Dkt. Yukiko Nakatani, Msaidizi Mkuu wa WHO, kuhusu upatikanaji wa dawa na bidhaa za afya. Serikali ya Jamhuri ya Korea inatoa anuwai kubwa ya vituo na programu za mafunzo za kitaifa, ambazo zinaangalizwa bidhaa za biolojia, na inaendelea na shughuli zake ili kukaa wageni kutoka nchi zingine, kupitia uanzishaji wa "Global Bio Education Campus" ambayo itafunguliwa mnamo 2025.

translations.source: “I hope this Memorandum of Understanding will enhance cooperation between the Republic of Korea and WHO to strengthen biomanufacturing capacities of LMICs,” said Mr Hwang Seunghyun Director General, Global Vaccine Hub Office at the Ministry of Health and Welfare from Republic of Korea. In parallel, WHO is intensifying regulatory system strengthening to ensure the quality and safety of health products. Stronger regulatory agencies will also enhance confidence in locally produced products and counter misinformation and the availability of unsafe substandard or falsified medicines.
translations.reference: "Ninatumai mkataba huu wa maelewano utaimarisha ushirikiano kati ya Jamhuri ya Korea na WHO ili kuimarisha uwezo na utengenezaji wa viumbe hai wa LMICs", alisema Bw Hwang Seunghyun mkurugenzi mkuu, ofisi za kitovu cha chanjo cha kimataifa katika wizara ya afya na ustawi kutoka Jamhuri ya Korea. Sambamba na hilo, WHO inaimarisha uimarishaji wa mfumo wa udhibiti ili kuhakikisha ubora na usalama wa bidhaa za afya. Mashirika yenye nguvu zaidi ya udhibiti pia yataongeza imani katika bidhaa zinazozalishwa nchini na kukabiliana na taarifa potofu na upatikanaji wa dawa zisizo na viwango, zisizo salama au zilizoghushiwa.
translations.hypothesis: “Natumai kwamba Mkataba huu utasaidia ushirikiano kati ya Jamhuri ya Korea na WHO ili kuimarisha uwezo wa uzalishaji wa bidhaa za biolojia katika nchi za Daraja Mwanzo,” alisema Mwenyekiti, Ofisi ya Global Vaccine Hub, kutoka Wizara ya Afya na Utunzaji, kutoka Jamhuri ya Korea, Bi Hwang Seunghyun. Pamoja na hayo, WHO inaendelea kuimarisha mfumo wa uthibitishaji ili kuhakikisha ubora na usalama wa bidhaa za afya. Vituo vya uthibitishaji vyenye nguvu pia vitasaidia kuimarisha imani katika bidhaa zinazozalishwa ndani, na kupunguza taarifa za uongo na upatikanaji wa dawa zisizo salama au bandia.

translations.source: WHO urges governments to stop subsidizing life-threatening tobacco crops On World No Tobacco Day, WHO urges governments to stop subsidizing tobacco farming and support more sustainable crops that could feed millions. “Tobacco is responsible for 8 million deaths a year, yet governments across the world spend millions supporting tobacco farms,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General. “By choosing to grow food instead of tobacco, we prioritize health, preserve ecosystems, and strengthen food security for all.” More than 300 million people globally are faced with acute food insecurity. Meanwhile more than 3 million hectares of land across more than 120 countries are being used to grow deadly tobacco, even in countries where people are starving.
